index.title: Onye ntụgharị akụrụngwa
index.description: Resource Translator na-emepe arịrịọ ndị a sụgharịrị igwe maka faịlụ akụ gị na repo ọ bụla, n'ụdị ọ bụla — kwadoro site na Azure AI Translator, AWS Translate, ma ọ bụ Google Cloud Translation.
index.socialTitle: Resource Translator — sụgharịa faịlụ akụ na-akpaghị aka
index.badge: v3.0 — Azure, AWS & Google providers, Node 24, repo config
index.lede: Onye ntụgharị Resource na-emepe arịrịọ ndị a sụgharịrị igwe maka faịlụ akụ gị site na iji Azure, AWS, ma ọ bụ Google — otu ihe dị n'otu, otu onye na-eweta ọrụ kwa ọsọ, SDK gọọmentị n'okpuru mkpuchi.
index.workflowTitle: Nsụgharị dị ka ọrụ, ọ bụghị ịrụ ọrụ.
index.workflowBody: Dobe ihe ahụ n'ime CI gị dị ugbu a, tụọ ya na Azure, AWS, ma ọ bụ Google, ma kwe ka repo gị kwuo asụsụ ọ bụla ị lekwasịrị anya.

formatNotes.json: Ewepụghị ma ọ bụ dị larịị

config.title: Repo-larịị config
config.body: Dobe faịlụ {configPath} maka gụnyere globs, glossaries, na Custom Translator edemede.

glossary.title: Glossary-maara
glossary.body: Mechie aha aha na okwu ngwaahịa na smart okwu-ókè regex nke na-ejikwa {cpp}, {dotnet}, na ndị enyi.

dryRun.title: Akọrọ-na-agba ọsọ + soft-ọdịda
dryRun.body: Nyochaa nsụgharị na-enweghị ide faịlụ, ma ọ bụ gosipụta njehie ọ bụla dị ka ịdọ aka ná ntị mgbe ị na-emegharị.

sdk.title: Azure, AWS na Google
sdk.body: Họrọ otu onye na-eweta ya kwa ọsọ. Onye ọ bụla na-ebugharị site na SDK gọọmentị ya ({azureSdk}, {awsSdk}, {googleSdk}) na nnwale akpaka na {statusCodes} — enweghị HTTP aka. {esbuild}-bundled, audit-ọcha.

workflowPreview.body: Ihe nzuzo atọ, ahịrị anọ, na repo gị na-asụ ọtụtụ asụsụ na nkwalite na-esote.
workflowPreview.setupLink: Na-agafe usoro zuru ezu nke usoro ihe omume ahụ.

cta.title: Njikere ịbanye na autopilot?
cta.body: Otu igodo ndị na-eweta ọrụ — Azure, AWS, ma ọ bụ Google — na otu faịlụ arụmọrụ. Onye ntụgharị ihe na-eme ka ndị ọzọ na-eme ihe ndị ọzọ.

getting-started.title: Ịmalite
getting-started.lede: Tinye faịlụ arụmọrụ, tụọ ya na nzere Azure AI Translator gị, ihe ahụ ga-enyocha repo maka faịlụ akụ asụsụ isi mmalite ma wepụta ụmụnne ndị a sụgharịrị sụgharịrị.

provision.title: Inye ihe Azure AI Translator resource
provision.body: Mepụta ihe ntụgharị ntụgharị Azure AI na ọnụ ụzọ Azure, wee chekwaa ihe ndị a dị ka ihe nzuzo nchekwa GitHub ka ọrụ ahụ wee nwee ike ịgụ ha:
provision.key: Pịa igodo ndebanye aha maka ihe onwunwe ahụ.

resource.title: Tinye faịlụ isi iyi
resource.body: Ndị na-ede blọgụ na-eji nkwekọrịta {namingConvention}. Dịka ọmụmaatụ, {sourceFile} na-aghọ {frFile}, {deFile}, na ihe ndị ọzọ mgbe ị na-agba ọsọ.

output.title: Nyochaa mmepụta
output.body: Ozugbo arụmọrụ ahụ gwụchara, ihe ahụ na-ekpughe nsonaazụ atọ ị nwere ike ịbanye na nkọwa PR: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, na {hasNewTranslations}. Ọ na-edekwa nchịkọta Markdown n'ime peeji nke ọrụ site na {coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Nzọụkwụ ndị ọzọ
nextSteps.recipes: Lee ntụziaka maka monorepos, omenala glossaries, na Omenala Translator edemede.

providers.title: Ndị na-enye ntụgharị
providers.lede: Họrọ otu onye na-eweta ntụgharị ntụgharị kwa ọsọ - Azure AI Translator, AWS Translate, ma ọ bụ Google Cloud Translation - n'azụ otu, API dị n'otu. Onye ntụgharị okwu na-akpa àgwà n'otu ụzọ ahụ n'agbanyeghị onye na-eweta ya; Naanị nzere dị iche.
providers.backwardCompatible: N'ụzọ zuru ezu azụ: {provider} ndabara na {azure}, yabụ arụmọrụ Azure dị ugbu a na-arụ ọrụ na-agbanwe agbanwe — enweghị ndezi achọrọ.

selecting.title: Ịhọrọ onye na-eweta ọrụ
selecting.body: Debe ntinye {provider} na {azure} (ndabara), {aws}, ma ọ bụ {google}, wee nye nzere nke onye na-eweta ya. Naanị otu onye na-eweta ọrụ na-eji oku oku ọ bụla; ihe omume ahụ na-eme ka SDK kwekọrọ na ya n'azụ ụlọ ọrụ mmepụta ihe.

aws.name: AWS Sụgharịa
aws.credentials: OIDC / ndabara yinye, ma ọ bụ awsAccessKeyId + awsSecretAccessKeyKey; awsRegion

azure.title: Azure AI Translator (ndabara)
azure.body: Onye na-eweta ihe na-adịghị mma. Nye ihe Azure AI Translator akụ na gafere {subscriptionKey}, {endpoint}, na nhọrọ {region}. Nke a bụ otu ihe ahụ ndị na-arụ ọrụ ugbu a na-eji.

aws.title: AWS Sụgharịa
aws.body: Jiri {sdk}. Họrọ OIDC site na {configureAwsCredentials} ka a ghara ịchekwa ihe nzuzo ogologo oge — ihe ahụ na-agụ AWS SDK ndabara nzere yinye. N'aka nke ọzọ, gafere {awsAccessKeyId} ma {awsSecretAccessKey} n'ụzọ doro anya. A na-achọ mpaghara mgbe niile, site na {awsRegion} ma ọ bụ {awsRegionEnv} gburugburu ebe obibi.
aws.keysNote: Iji jiri igodo static kama OIDC, dobe nzọụkwụ {configureAwsCredentials} ma gafere {awsAccessKeyId} / {awsSecretAccessKey} (site na {secrets}) gbakwunyere {awsRegion}.

google.title: Google Cloud Translation
google.body: Jiri {sdk} (v2). Nyochaa na igodo API ({googleApiKey}) ma ọ bụ nzere JSON akaụntụ ọrụ ({googleCredentials}). Nye kpọmkwem otu; A na-ewepụta {googleProjectId} nhọrọ site na nzere mgbe ewepụrụ ya.

mapping.title: Ebumnuche nkọwapụta map
mapping.body: A na-edepụta ndị na-eweta ihe ndị a kapịrị ọnụ ebe otu ihe ahụ dị. Ihe ndị ọzọ niile na-alaghachi na ndabara ezi uche dị na ya, yabụ omume na-agbanwe agbanwe.
mapping.caption: Ebumnuche nkọwapụta map gafee ndị na-eweta ọrụ

locales.title: Koodu mpaghara dị iche iche kwa onye na-eweta ya
locales.body: Onye ọ bụla na-eweta ọrụ na-eji koodu mpaghara nke ya (dịka ọmụmaatụ Simplified Chinese {azureCode} na Azure, {awsCode} na AWS, na {googleCode} na Google). Koodu na-agafe dị ka ọ dị ma na-ebugharị aha faịlụ mmepụta, yabụ họrọ ụkpụrụ {toLocales} ị họọrọ na-akwado.

configuration.title: Nhazi
configuration.lede: Gosipụta ndabara otu ugboro na faịlụ nhazi ebe nchekwa ma kwe ka ọrụ ọ bụla keta ha. Action inputs mgbe niile na-emeri mgbe ha abụọ.
configuration.intro: Gbanyụọ ụzọ ahụ site na ntinye {configPath} ma ọ bụrụ na ịchọrọ ebe na-abụghị ndabara.

fields.sourceLocale: Ọ ga-alaghachi na ntinye {sourceLocale} ma ọ bụrụ na edozibeghị. A na-eziga ya na onye ntụgharị {fromLocale} ka eriri dị mkpirikpi anaghị akpaghị aka.
fields.toLocales: Ma ọ bụ otu n'ime ihe ndị a na-eme ka ọ bụrụ na ị
fields.includeExclude: Usoro Glob na-enyocha megide ụzọ zuru oke na ebe ọrụ.
fields.categoryId: Ụdị {customTranslatorLink} Azure — ụlọ ọrụ gị / ngalaba gị (iwu, ọgwụ, ụda ahịa, wdg). Zitere ya dị ka {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Ọdịda na {plain}. Jiri {html} naanị ma ọ bụrụ na ụkpụrụ akụ gị nwere ezigbo iberibe HTML.
fields.profanityAction: Olee otú iji tọghata MOV ka iTunes ndabere faịlụ?
fields.profanityMarker: Naanị ihe bara uru ma ọ bụrụ na {profanityAction} {marked}.
fields.allowFallback: Setịpụrụ ka {false} ka ọ daa nsụgharị ahụ mgbe {categoryId} gị enweghị ntinye maka mpaghara ezubere iche kama ịlaghachi na ihe nlereanya izugbe.
fields.apiVersion: Translator REST API version. Ọdịda na {version}.
fields.maxRetries: Kacha nnwale nnwale na nzaghachi HTTP na-adịgide adịgide ({statusCodes}). Ada ada ada {defaultRetries} Ngụkọta nke oku HTTP kwa arịrịọ bụ {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: A na-ehi ụra n'elu ikpo okwu ọ bụla na-ehi ụra. Ọdịda na {defaultBackoff}. A na-asọpụrụ nkụnye eji isi mee {retryAfter} Azure kpọmkwem mgbe ọ nọ; ma ọ bụghị ya, a na-eji jittered exponential backoff, capped na uru a.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Ọdịda na {true}. Mgbe a na-arụ ọrụ, tokens dị ka {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} na HTML entities na-eji akara ngosi sentinel dochie tupu nsụgharị ma weghachite mgbe e mesịrị. Gbanyụọ naanị mgbe isi mmalite nwere ihe ndị dị n'ụdị placeholder.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Usoro regex ndị ọzọ (na-enweghị delimiters) agbakwunyere na setịpụrụ ntọala ndabara, dịka ọmụmaatụ {angleToken} maka syntax akara ngosi omenala. A na-eleghara regexes na-ezighi ezi anya.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Usoro Glob kwekọrọ na igodo ọkwa parser (ụzọ ntụpọ JSON, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext igodo). A na-ewepụ igodo ndị kwekọrọ na arịrịọ ahụ ma gafere na isi mmalite ha echekwara.

steps.actionInputs: Ihe omume ahụ na-agụ ntinye doro anya site na arụmọrụ.
steps.config: Ọ na-ebu YAML config site na {configPath}.
steps.precedence: Maka ubi ọ bụla na-ekerịta, ntinye na-emeri; ma ọ bụghị ya, a na-eji uru YAML.
steps.validation: A na-akwado ụkpụrụ ndị a jikọtara. Enums na-ezighi ezi (dịka {invalidEnum}) na-eme ka ihe ahụ daa ngwa ngwa na ozi doro anya.

tone.heading: Ụda na ụlọ ọrụ, n'ụzọ doro anya
tone.body: Azure AI Translator v3 API enweghị otu ụda ụda Ntọala abụọ na-ejikọta iji nye gị ọtụtụ n'ime otu njikwa ahụ.
tone.industryBody: Jiri {categoryId} iji rụtụ aka na ụdị Azure {customTranslatorLink} zụrụ azụ na corpus nke gị — iwu, teknụzụ, ọgwụ, ahịa, ma ọ bụ ihe ọ bụla ọzọ. Nke a bụ ihe kachasị ike maka ụda, olu akara, na okwu.
tone.surfaceBody: Jiri {glossaryLink} iji mechie aha aha na okwu ngwaahịa n'okwu okwu, ma jiri {profanityAction} iji kpochapụ okwu rụrụ arụ mgbe ị na-elekwasị anya na mpaghara maka ndị na-eto eto.

inputs.title: Ntinye na mmepụta
inputs.lede: A na-anabatakwa ntinye ọ bụla na faịlụ repo config. Mgbe a na-edozi ha abụọ, ntinye ihe na-emeri.
inputs.configurationIntro: Lelee {configurationLink} maka usoro YAML na usoro ibudata.

items.sourceLocale: Isi mmalite locale (dịka {en}) iji chọta faịlụ akụ dị ka {sourceGlob}. A na-ezigakwa ya na onye na-eweta ya dị ka {fromLocale}.

providerInputs.heading: Nhọrọ ndị na-eweta ọrụ na nzere
providerInputs.caption: Nhọrọ ndị na-eweta ọrụ na nzere kwa onye na-ere ahịa
providerInputs.intro: Họrọ otu onye na-eweta ọrụ kwa na-agba ọsọ na {provider}. Nye naanị nzere nke onye na-eweta ahọpụtara — lee ntuziaka {providersLink} maka nhazi zuru ezu.

items.provider: Onye na-eweta nsụgharị: {azure} (ndabara), {aws}, ma ọ bụ {google}. Naanị otu onye na-eweta ọrụ na-eji oku oku ọ bụla.
items.subscriptionKey: Azure AI Translator ndenye aha igodo. Achọrọ maka {azure}. Gafere site na {secrets}.
items.endpoint: Azure Translator endpoint URL, dịka ọmụmaatụ {endpointUrl}. Achọrọ maka {azure}.
items.awsAccessKeyId: AWS Access Key ID. Nhọrọ — wepụ (na {awsSecretAccessKey}) iji AWS ndabara nzere yinye / OIDC. Gafere site na {secrets}.
items.awsSecretAccessKey: Igodo nzuzo nzuzo nke AWS A ghaghị itinye ya na {awsAccessKeyId}. Gafere site na {secrets}.
items.awsSessionToken: Nhọrọ AWS nnọkọ token maka nzere nwa oge. Gafere site na {secrets}.
items.awsRegion: Mpaghara AWS maka ọrụ ntụgharị (dịka {regionExample}). Ọ dị mkpa maka {aws} ọ gwụla ma etinyere {awsRegionEnv} na gburugburu ebe obibi.
items.googleApiKey: Google Cloud API igodo. Nye nke a ma ọ bụ {googleCredentials} maka {google}. Gafere site na {secrets}.
items.googleCredentials: Igodo akaụntụ Google Cloud dị ka eriri JSON. Nye nke a ma ọ bụ {googleApiKey} maka {google}. Gafere site na {secrets}.
items.googleProjectId: Nhọrọ Google Cloud Project ID. A na-ejikarị ya eme ihe site na nzere akaụntụ ọrụ.

items.region: Translation resource region (omit for global resources).
items.toLocales: Ebe ndị a ga-asụgharị. Na-anabata usoro JSON ({jsonArray}) ma ọ bụ ụkpụrụ ndị dị iche iche.
items.include: Newline-kewapụrụ glob ụkpụrụ; A na-asụgharị naanị faịlụ ndị kwekọrọ ekwekọ.
items.exclude: Newline-kewapụrụ glob ụkpụrụ; A na-ewepụ faịlụ ndị kwekọrọ na ya (etinyere mgbe etinyechara ya).
items.configPath: Pathzọ zuru ezu na edemede: Gam akporosis " Ngwa gam akporo " Ngwa ngwa
items.dryRun: Mgbe {true}, na-agba ọsọ nsụgharị ma wepụta nchịkọta ma ghara ide faịlụ.
items.failOnError: Mgbe {true}, njehie ndị a na-atụghị anya ya na-ada eme; Mgbe {false}, njehie bụ ịdọ aka ná ntị.

translatorInputs.heading: Azure Translator arịrịọ ntinye
translatorInputs.intro: Ndị a na-ese foto ozugbo na Azure AI Translator v3 ajụjụ parameters ma tinye aka na onye na-eweta azure. textType na okwu rụrụ arụAction na-mapped na AWS / Google ebe ihe yiri ya dị (lee ntuziaka ndị na-eweta ya); Ndị fọdụrụ bụ naanị Azure. Onye ọ bụla n'ime ha bụ nhọrọ; Ntughari nsụgharị na-emetụta mgbe a na-edozighị ya.
translatorInputs.caption: Azure Translator arịrịọ ntinye

items.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} Atiya — ụlọ ọrụ / ngalaba / ụda knob. Zigara ya dị ka {categoryQuery}.
items.textType: {plain} ma ọ bụ {html}. Jiri {html} naanị mgbe ụkpụrụ akụ gị bụ ezigbo iberibe HTML.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked} ma ọ bụ {deleted}. Ọ na-achịkwa otú e si ewepụta okwu rụrụ arụ na nsụgharị.
items.profanityMarker: {asterisk} ma ọ bụ {tag}. Naanị ihe bara uru ma ọ bụrụ na {profanityAction} {marked}.
items.allowFallback: Mgbe {false}, Onye ntụgharị na-eweghachi njehie kama ịlaghachi na usoro izugbe ma ọ bụrụ na {categoryId} gị enweghị ntinye maka mpaghara ezubere iche.

resilienceInputs.heading: Resilience & placeholder nchedo
resilienceInputs.intro: Ntinye ndị a na-achịkwa etu ihe ahụ si akpa àgwà mgbe onye ntụgharị okwu na-egbochi arịrịọ gị na otu o si echebe akara ngosi dị ka {mustache} ma ọ bụ {indexZero} ka ọ ghara ịdị na-emebi emebi n'oge ntụgharị.
resilienceInputs.caption: Resilience na placeholder nchedo inputs

items.maxRetries: Kacha nnwale nnwale na nzaghachi HTTP na-adịgide adịgide ({statusCodes}). Ọnụ ọgụgụ zuru ezu nke oku HTTP kwa arịrịọ bụ {totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Cap (na milliseconds) na ihe ọ bụla backoff ụra. Ihe omume ahụ na-asọpụrụ nkụnye eji isi mee nzaghachi {retryAfter} nke Azure kpọmkwem mgbe ọ dị; ma ọ bụghị ya, ọ na-eji jittered exponential backoff capped na uru a.
items.protectPlaceholders: Mgbe {true} (ndabara), ndị na-ejide ebe dị ka {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} na HTML na-eji akara ngosi sentinel tupu nsụgharị ma weghachite mgbe e mesịrị. Gbanyụọ naanị mgbe isi mmalite gị kpachaara anya nwere ederede ederede nke a ga-asụgharị.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Newline-kewapụrụ regexes (na-enweghị delimiters) kwukwara na ndabara placeholder set, e.g. {angleToken} maka omenala token syntax.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Newline-kewapụrụ glob ụkpụrụ kwekọrọ na parser-larịị igodo (JSON dotted ụzọ, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext igodo). A na-ahapụ igodo ndị kwekọrọ na arịrịọ Ntụgharị ma gafere na uru isi mmalite ha echekwara.

items.summaryTitle: Nchịkọta dị mkpirikpi nke PR-aha-enyi na enyi, dịka ọmụmaatụ {summaryExample}.
items.summaryDetails: Markdown summary kwesịrị ekwesị maka ahụ PR ma ọ bụ nchịkọta ọrụ.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} mgbe e mepụtara otu nsụgharị ọhụrụ ma ọ bụ karịa.

formats.title: Ụdị faịlụ
formats.lede: Isii gburugburu-trippable akụ formats. Ihe omume ahụ na-agụ faịlụ isi mmalite ọ bụla, sụgharịa ụkpụrụ, ma dee nwanne nwoke kwa mpaghara ezubere iche.

resx.blurb: XML dabeere na .NET akụ faịlụ. Sụgharịa ederede dị n'ime nke {dataValue} ọ bụla, na-echekwa okwu na metadata.

xliff.blurb: Akwụkwọ OASIS XLIFF 2.0. Sụgharịa {source} ọ bụla ma dee nsonaazụ ahụ n'ime {target} kwekọrọ, na-edozi {trgLang} maka mpaghara.

po.blurb: GNU gettext Portable Object files. Sụgharịa {msgid} ọ bụla / {msgidPlural} n'ụdị {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural}.

json.blurb: Faịlụ JSON na-enweghị isi. Nested ihe na-ewepụghị na {delimiter} delimiter maka ntụgharị, mgbe ahụ re-nested na mmepụta. A na-echekwa igodo dotted ({dottedKey}) verbatim.

ini.blurb: Mfe {keyValue} faịlụ (Win32-style INI ma ọ bụ ihe ọ bụla ewepụghị config). A na-echekwa nkụnye eji isi okwu na nkụnye eji eme ihe.

restext.blurb: Microsoft MUI ederede akụrụngwa — ewepụghị {keyValue} ụzọ abụọ eji dị ka a textual enyi na {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Round-njem nkwa
roundTrip.body: The ule suite na-enyocha byte-for-byte gburugburu-tripping maka nnọchiteanya fixtures nke ọ bụla format. Ọ bụrụ na a format quirk agbaji gburugburu-tripping na gị codebase, biko {issueLink} na a obere sample.

recipes.title: Ntụziaka
recipes.lede: Common nakawa etu esi maka mbupu nsụgharị: monorepos, glossaries, omenala edemede, akọrọ na-agba ọsọ, na ụda akara.

pullRequest.heading: Meghee arịrịọ na-adọta mgbe ọ bụla na-agba ọsọ

glossary.heading: Glossary maka aha njirimara na okwu ngwaahịa
glossary.body: A na-etinye okwu glossary {after} ntụgharị, yabụ mmepụta igwe a sụgharịrị na-eme ka akara kachasị amasị gị ọbụlagodi mgbe ihe nlereanya ahụ gbanwere ya maka nkwekọrịta.

customCategory.heading: Omenala Nsụgharị Atiya (ụlọ ọrụ / ngalaba)
customCategory.body: Zụọ ụdị Azure {customTranslatorLink} na corpus nke na-ejide okwu ụlọ ọrụ gị na ụda (iwu, ahụike, ahịa, injinịa dị n'ime, wdg) ma gafere ID ya site na {categoryId}. Nke a bụ ihe kachasị ike nke Azure na-enye.

tone.heading: Ụda akara + siri ike fallback
tone.body: Jikọta {categoryId} ntụgharị omenala na {profanityAction} na {allowFallbackFalse} iji mezuo olu na-agbanwe agbanwe ma daa arụmọrụ ma ọ bụrụ na ụdị ahọpụtara enweghị ntinye maka otu n'ime mpaghara gị.

dryRun.heading: Gbanyụọ ọrụ ahụ tupu ịmalite ịrụ ọrụ ahụ.
dryRun.body: Ihe omume ahụ ka na-ewepụta nchịkọta nchịkọta na nchịkọta nzọụkwụ, ma ọ dịghị faịlụ ederede. Jikọtara ya na {failOnErrorFalse} iji gosipụta okwu ọ bụla dị ka ịdọ aka ná ntị mgbe ị na-emegharị.

faq.title: Ajụjụ ana ajukari
faq.lede: Azịza ngwa ngwa maka ajụjụ ndị na-abịakarị mgbe ị na-eme ihe omume ahụ.

azure.heading: Kedu ka ihe omume ahụ si agwa Azure?
azure.body: Site na {azureSdkLink} SDK nke Microsoft, nke a na-etinye na {corePipelineLink}. Nke ahụ na-eme ka ị na-emegharị akpaka na {statusCodes}, ụdị arịrịọ na nzaghachi, na njikwa nkụnye eji isi mee n'efu — ihe niile na-abụbu oku {axios} aka. Ọnọdụ ọha na eze (ntinye, mmepụta, mmepụta faịlụ) agbanwebeghị.

tone.heading: Gịnị mere mgbe ụfọdụ ndị na-ede blọgụ ji apụ ma ọ bụ na-apụ apụ?
tone.body: Nsụgharị igwe na-ada ada na ihe nlereanya izugbe. Atọ knobs na-enyere aka: a {glossaryLink} maka ike okwu overrides, a {customTranslatorLink} maka ọma-edozi ụdị zụrụ azụ na gị ụda na okwu, na {profanityAction} ihichapụ ma ọ bụ ọkọlọtọ okwu rụrụ arụ.

duplicateFiles.heading: Kedu ka m ga-esi zere ịsụgharị otu faịlụ ahụ ugboro abụọ?
duplicateFiles.body: Mee ka arụmọrụ ahụ dị na {paths} nke dabara na faịlụ isi iyi gị naanị, dịka {sourceGlob}. Ihe omume ahụ na-agụnyekwa nzacha faịlụ nke ya mgbe edobere {githubToken}, na-ebelata ọrụ na faịlụ na ntinye ọhụrụ.

offline.heading: Enwere m ike ịme ihe omume ahụ na-anọghị n'ịntanetị?
offline.body: Ọ bụghị kpọmkwem — Azure AI Translator bụ ụbụrụ na-agba ọsọ. Ma ị nwere ike ịgba ọsọ na {dryRunTrue} iji kwado parsing na config na-enweghị ịme arịrịọ HTTP ọ bụla maka nsụgharị.

node.heading: Kedu ụdị Node ka ihe omume ahụ na-agba ọsọ?
node.body: V3 na-agba ọsọ na GitHub Actions {nodeRuntime} na-agba ọsọ. Javascript jikọtara ya na Node 20, 22, na 24, nke bụ ihe CI na-anwale.

dist.heading: Ebee ka {distDir} ndị na-agba ịnyịnya ígwè si abịa?
dist.body: GitHub JS omume na-ebuga JS ha achịkọtara na ebe nchekwa. Ọrụ {distBuild} na-ewughachi ya mgbe njikọta ọ bụla ga-{mainBranch} ma ọ bụrụ na ọ ga-agagharị, ma {distCheck} na-egbochi PR nke ga-ada mmepụta oge ochie.

formats.heading: Ma gịnị banyere ndị ọzọ resource formats?
formats.body: Taa: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} ma ọ bụrụ na ịchọrọ ọzọ — interface parser dị obere (parse → map → itinye nsụgharị → usoro) na onyinye na-anabata.

translations.title: Nsụgharị
translations.lede: A na-asụgharị ibe a site na Resource Translator n'onwe ya, na nkwalite ọ bụla na isi, n'asụsụ ọ bụla Azure AI Translator na-akwado.
translations.statusPending: {translatedCount} ugbu a sụgharịrị — {pendingCount} na-echere {workflowName} na-esote na-agba ọsọ.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Chọọ site na asụsụ, koodu, ma ọ bụ aha ala.
translations.noLocales: Enweghị mpaghara dabara na nzacha ahụ.

howItWorks.heading: Olee otú nke a si arụ ọrụ

steps.source: Isi mmalite nke Bekee na-ebi na {messagesPath}.
steps.workflow: Pushes na mmetụ ọ kick si {workflowLink}, nke na-agba ọsọ {thisAction} megide onwe ya.
steps.fanOut: Ihe omume ahụ na-aga na mpaghara ọ bụla na-akwado Azure AI Translator (ahaziri na {configPath}) ma dee nwanne {messagesLocaleJson} kwa ebumnuche.
steps.pullRequest: A na-emeghe arịrịọ ndọpụ na nsụgharị ọhụrụ. Ijikọta ya na-ebipụta peeji a na kaadị ndị jupụtara.

translations.poweredBy: Kwadoro site na Resource Translator na Azure AI Translator.

contributing.title: Inye aka
contributing.lede: A na-anabata akụkọ bug, arịrịọ atụmatụ, na arịrịọ eserese. Ihe omume ahụ dị ntakịrị iji bụrụ enyi na enyi nye ndị na-enye aka oge mbụ.

steps.fixture: Tinye otu n'ime ihe ndị dị n'okpuru {testDataDir}.
steps.extension: Tinye ndọtị faịlụ ahụ na {translationFileSchemes} na {finderFile}.
steps.tests: Dee ule njem gburugburu maka parse → format na applyTranslations.

coverage.heading: Mkpuchi mkpuchi
coverage.body: The Jest config na-amanye kacha nta mkpuchi. Koodu ọhụrụ ga-edebe nkwupụta + akara n'elu 78% ma rụọ ọrụ karịa 90%. Tinye ihe ndozi na ule n'akụkụ mgbanwe gị.

docsSite.heading: Ebe nrụọrụ weebụ
docsSite.body: Nchekwa {docsDir} bụ ọrụ Astro 6 + Tailwind v4. Na-agba ọsọ {npmInstall} ebe ahụ otu ugboro, wee {npmRunDev} maka nlele mpaghara. Ọrụ {pagesWorkflow} na-ebuga docs na GitHub Pages na njikọta ọ bụla.

changelog.title: Ndekọ mgbanwe
changelog.lede: Nchịkọta dị elu nke ntọhapụ. Canonical, ikike changelog na-ebi n'CHANGELOG.md na ebe nchekwa.

releases.v302: {label} Translator arịrịọ ugbu a pin {apiVersion} na waya maka ma {translate} na {languages}. Azure SDK na-asọpụrụ nhọrọ api-version nke onye ahịa mgbe a gafere nzere; Ihe omume ahụ na-ekwenye na arịrịọ ọ bụla site na nkụnye eji isi mee, yabụ nhọrọ ahụ na-agbachi nkịtị na arịrịọ na-adaba na nsụgharị API nke nkwekọrịta {translate} jụrụ ahụ na HTTP 400 (koodu njehie {code}). Mezue ndozi ahụ malitere na 3.0.1.
releases.v301: {label} Ahụ arịrịọ {translate} ugbu a bụ usoro JSON nke ihe {textItem} kama ihe {inputs} kechie, nke kwekọrọ na nkwekọrịta v3.0 REST. N'onwe ya, nke a eweghachighị nsụgharị — lee 3.0.2.

items.newInputs: Ntinye ọhụrụ: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, gbakwunyere bọtịnụ ntụgharị ntụgharị dị elu {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker}, na {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: A na-ezigakwa ebe isi mmalite ugbu a na Translator dị ka {fromLocale} ya mere a naghị achọpụta ụdọ dị mkpirikpi.
items.resilience: {label} na-akpaghị aka na nzaghachi HTTP na-adịgide adịgide ({statusCodes}) na-asọpụrụ nkụnye eji isi mee nke Azure {retryAfter} — na-alaghachi azụ na jittered exponential backoff mgbe ọ na-anọghị. Tunable site na {maxRetries} na {retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} tokens dị ka {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} na HTML entities na-kechie na sentinels tupu nsụgharị na weghachite mgbe e mesịrị, otú Translator na-akwụsị mangling i18next / Mustache / Handlebars / .NET / printf placeholders. Toggle site na {protectPlaceholders}; Gbasaa na {customPlaceholderPatterns}. {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} ọhụrụ {noTranslatePatterns} input dobe kenha igodo si Translator arịrịọ kpamkpam (na-echekwa isi mmalite ụkpụrụ maka ika aha, njehie codes, wdg). Kwekọrọ glob nakawa etu esi megide parser-larịị igodo (JSON dotted ụzọ, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext igodo). {issue}
items.glossary: Glossary nkwado, nzọụkwụ nchịkọta site na {coreSummary}.
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 ewepụghị config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.docsSite: Astro + Tailwind v4 docs saịtị na echiche mgbanwe na Expressive Code.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA ngafe. Logo glyphs gbanwere n'ụzọ ka ha wee ghara ịdaba na agba megide nkwụsị gradient, bọtịnụ {backToTop} na-ese n'elu mmiri na-eji {inert} mgbe zoro ezo (kama {ariaHidden} toggle nke hapụrụ ya tabbable), {formatsAstro} ngalaba anaghịzi adaba na njirimara isi ha na-akpaghị aka, kaadị mpaghara atọ ugbu a na-ekpughe njirimara {lang} BCP-47 ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), oyiri akara ngosi {documentation} akara ngosi na-disambiguated n'etiti sidebar na footer,  na tebụl data ọ bụla na {inputs} / {configuration} ụgbọ mmiri nwere nkọwa ihuenyo.
items.inlineCode: {label} docs prose {codeElement} ugbu a na-eyi isiokwu na-ekpo ọkụ / amber — dị iche na palette →accent eji maka njikọ na isiokwu.
items.automation: Dependabot auto-merge, CodeQL scanning, CI matriks.
